# ArgumentCompleter delegate

Computes ranked completion candidates for a partial argument value (spec §19).

```csharp
public delegate IReadOnlyList<string> ArgumentCompleter(string value);
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The current partial value (the match seed). |

## Return Value

The candidate values, most relevant first.
